findings.evidence: The HTML rendering includes a horizontal line underneath the 'AGENDA' heading, which is not present in the source PDF.

findings.description: Implicit columns converted to an explicit table with added headers.
findings.evidence: The PDF uses whitespace to align text into three distinct columns. The HTML rendering transforms this into a formal HTML table with borders and injects a new header row ('Time', 'Topic', 'Presenter') that is absent from the original document.
